plan_name: Wexford County Development Plan 2022-2028 - Volume 2: Development Management Manual
source_url: https://consult.wexfordcoco.ie/ (Wexford CDP 2022-2028, Volume 2 Development Management Manual)
notes: Dedicated DM Manual (Volume 2). Clean extraction: Table 3-4 (floor area + private open space), Table 3-3 (rural site size by floor area: 0.2/0.2/0.4/1.0 ha), 22m separation, 30-50 uph, explicit AA/EIA/TTA triggers with numeric TTA threshold tables (6-1/6-2/6-3).
